title: LoRA settings UI: clip knob is per-TEMPLATE (Wan model-only -> drop clip; LTX clip-capable -> keep)
description: The LoRA settings UI shows both Strength (MODEL) and Clip for every LoRA. The clip knob is misleading where the TEMPLATE'S LoRA nodes don't take clip. Decision: drive the UI off the template's node capability, NOT per-LoRA detection (user adds LoRAs anytime; live header introspection is overkill). Wan template uses MODEL-ONLY LoRA nodes -> the Clip slider does nothing -> REMOVE Clip from the Wan LoRA UI. LTX template will use clip-capable LoRA loaders (LoraLoader, model+clip) -> KEEP Strength + Clip for LTX. So the UI matches the workflow per model family. Future session. See brief.md.
